saw: A desk robot demo that actually picks up a pen on first try.
most_people_think: Robotics hype — another demo that breaks in production.
i_think_it_means: Vision-language-action models are crossing from lab to boring desk tasks.
heres_the_move: Try one boring physical task, document every failure, ignore the hype cycle.

draft_clip.hook: Everyone showed you the robot catching the pen. Nobody showed you attempt 47.
draft_clip.body: The move is not the demo. It is the failure log.
draft_clip.cta: Pick one boring task. Ship the log.
